concept: lacquered; stacked metaphors; near-future city; broken clock
answer:
Optics, Synchronicity, Time, Reflections, Chronography, Retrograde.

Time-stitched narratives, echoing through the heart of the city where the clock tower stands, a timeless reminder of moments that linger beneath the surface. Each story unfolds like a tapestry woven with the threads of yesterday and tomorrow, each tick and tock a marker of the fleeting existence that we all share.
